prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约8299→14964→12721→10571→25587。2021–2024年理科位次在8000–15000区间波动，2025年山西省首次实施新高考（3+1+2），物理类位次大幅后移至25587，属考试模式切换带来的结构性调整，并非学校竞争力下降；该校在山西省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年53人、2022年62人、2023年65人、2024年61人、2025年76人、2026年76人。2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第59名，近年排名稳定在50–60区间，学校层次稳固；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍安检等校园管理事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第41位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，报考关注度一般偏暖。历史投档异常记录中未见暨南大学在山西省的断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，新闻传播学A、工商管理A、应用经济学A-、中国语言文学A-、生物学A-、药学A-，共6个A-及以上学科，经管与人文社科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；金融/财经/经济分化观望但仍有热度；山西省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解；暨南大学位于广东广州，属华南地区热门高校；山西省非该校本地生源大省，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅后移的结构性特征、2026年招生计划持平、考生数小幅减少、声誉中性偏正面等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约25387名，区间24887–25887名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 8299 → 14964 → 12721 → 10571 → 25587. From 2021 to 2024, the science ranking fluctuated in the 8000–15000 range. In 2025, Shanxi Province implemented the new college entrance examination (3+1+2) for the first time, causing the physics category ranking to drop significantly to 25587, a structural adjustment due to the exam mode change, not a decline in the university's competitiveness. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province: 53 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 61 in 2024, 76 in 2025, and 76 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 59th in 2026, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, and generally warm application attention. There is no signal of a break in the historical abnormal filing records of Jinan University in Shanxi Province. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-, with outstanding strength in economics, management, and humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are differentiated and wait-and-see but still have popularity. In 2026, there are 167,419 physics category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular university in South China. Shanxi Province is not a major local source province for this university, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the structural characteristics of the significant ranking drop in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight decrease in the number of candidates, and a neutral-to-positive reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the physics category in 2026 will slightly move forward (slightly increased competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 25387, with a range of 24887–25887.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<24887), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>25887), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety net majors.

The best ranking was in 2021 (1279), with a significant drop to 2835 in 2022, followed by fluctuations in the 2000–2500 range, showing a wide volatility pattern. The baseline for 2025 is about 2505. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shanxi Province: 27 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 18 in 2025, and 16 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 2 students (-11.1%), which may intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 49th, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, indicating a solid institutional level. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 41st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of a cutoff drop for Jinan University in Shanxi Province. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Journalism and Communication (A), Business Administration (A), Chinese Language and Literature (A-), and Applied Economics (A-) highlight strong humanities, social sciences, and economics management disciplines, highly matching the liberal arts admission majors.

Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular university in the South China region. Shanxi Province is not a major local source of students for this university, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the wide fluctuation of historical rankings in the 2000–2800 range, the 11.1% enrollment reduction in 2026, but a 25.6% decrease in candidate numbers (competition relief greater than enrollment reduction impact), and a neutral to slightly positive reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for history category in 2026 will slightly improve compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2288, with a range of 1876–2700.
